name: 08_occupancy_pipeline
description: Runs 08_occupancy_prediction notebook. Generates gold_occupancy_profile — hourly occupancy probability per building per day-of-week. Called by 04_master_orchestrator as Stage_3_Occupancy. SOFT DEPENDENCY: failure is non-blocking for downstream Gold KPI stage.

activities.name: Run_Occupancy_Prediction
activities.description: 08_occupancy_prediction: two-step hybrid occupancy model. Step 1: rule-based archetypes by building_type (ASHRAE 90.1). Step 2: calibration via silver_energy_readings consumption signal. Output: gold_occupancy_profile (168 rows per building).
